era_context: Middle Bronze Age II. Hyksos control of the Egyptian Delta continues. Mesopotamia is in the final Old Babylonian period. The Indus Valley Civilization is in its late phase. Shang dynasty consolidates power in China.

events.title: No specific events confirmed for this year
events.description: No events of documented historical significance have been identified for 1939 BCE.

sources.name: Historiographic consensus on Middle Bronze Age chronology

disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed (none listed).
historiographic_note: 1939 BCE is undocumented in surviving sources. The historical record for the mid-2nd millennium BCE is characterized by long stretches of silence punctuated by brief, often uncertain references in later compilations.
